text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold City doesn't show up for training.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I got a call from a store I'm a regular at, saying
they had some new items in...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And, well, I got so excited talking about outfits, I
completely lost track of time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City apologizes again, and I give her a firm
reminder to be careful next time.
